Khavatari Kashu:
I used to travel around the world teaching young Orcs the art of Khavatari.
But time takes it toll. I am not young anymore and each day I feel weaker than the last.
And yet my mind is as sharp as ever. I understand that the Orcs are facing a terrible calamity and each of us has to do their part. I came here because I'm ready to fight until the end!
